status: draft
shortDescription: "Methods can be defined outside a class"
concepts:
  - Method
  - Class
related:
# - id: LiteralNoExpression
#   relation: Special case
inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: MethodsWithoutClass
# - pl: Python

spec:
# - id: jls13

plVersion:
# from: jls8
# to: jls14
---
One can have functions that are not members of a class. E.g., one could have a function `int len(String s)` and one could call that function like this: `len("Hi")`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Methods can be defined outside a class
